svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="d1IvjkFicdaEXN607r_z"> <mxGraphModel dx="1665" dy="743" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor Vizitator
actor Client
actor Administrator
actor \"Vânzător\" as Vanzator
actor Curier
actor \"Sistem de plată\" as SistemPlata

Client --|> Vizitator

rectangle Platforma {
 (vizualizare produse) as vp
 (căutare produse) as cp
 (creare/intrare cont) as cc

 (gestionare coș) as ac
 (plasare comandă) as pc
 (efectuare plată) as ep
 (urmărire comandă) as uc
 (gestionare cont) as gc

 (gestionare utilizatori) as gu
 (gestionare produse) as gp
 (gestionare comenzi) as gcom
 (generare rapoarte) as gr

 (adăugare produs) as ap
 (modificare produs) as mp
 (ștergere produs) as sp
 (gestionare produse) as ggp
 (procesare comenzi) as prc

 (preluare comandă) as plc
 (livrare comandă) as lc
 (actualizare status livrare) as asl

 (procesare plată) as pp
}

Vizitator -- vp
Vizitator -- cp
Vizitator -- cc

Client -- ac
Client -- pc
Client -- ep
Client -- uc
Client -- gc

Administrator -- gu
Administrator -- gp
Administrator -- gcom
Administrator -- gr

Vanzator -- ggp
ap ..> ggp : <<extend>>
mp ..> ggp : <<extend>>
sp ..> ggp : <<extend>>
Vanzator -- prc

Curier -- plc
Curier -- lc
Curier -- asl

SistemPlata -- pp

pc ..> ep : <<include>>
ep ..> pp : <<include>>
lc ..> prc : <<include>>
plc ..> prc : <<include>>
asl ..> prc : <<include>>
pc ..> ac : <<include>>

cc ..> Client : <<create>>

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="1FPXEqYswprkNd3sxcFw-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1343" width="1028" x="20" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 1028px; height: 1343px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
